scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @xstretch/shared build && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @xstretch/api dev" "pnpm --filter @xstretch/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @xstretch/shared build && pnpm --filter @xstretch/api build && pnpm --filter @xstretch/web build && tsx scripts/verify-native.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @xstretch/shared build && pnpm --filter @xstretch/api test && pnpm --filter @xstretch/web test && pnpm test:native
